summary: Verified table map percentage-based positioning with fixed 16:10 aspect ratio. All features working correctly across Desktop (1280px), iPad (768px), Android Chrome (412px), and Safari iOS (390px).

relative_position_verification.description: All tables maintain identical percentage positions across all viewports

tests.name: Drag functionality
tests.details: Table 1 dragged from x=195 to x=257

light_mode_rendering.details: Table map renders correctly in light mode with proper contrast

dark_mode_rendering.details: Dark mode settings accessible via Config > Apariencia

fixed_aspect_ratio.details: Map canvas maintains 16:10 (1.60) aspect ratio on all devices

percentage_positioning.details: Tables use percentage-based positioning (x, y as 0-100)

responsive_scaling.details: Tables scale appropriately based on device type (mobile/tablet/desktop)

centered_map_area.details: Map area is centered within container on portrait devices

edit_mode.details: Drag and resize functionality works correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Table map percentage-based positioning with fixed 16:10 aspect ratio verified working. Key implementation: Lines 349-382 in TableMap.js calculate fixed aspect ratio, Lines 468-483 center the map area, Lines 141-142 convert percentages to pixels. All 8 tables maintain identical relative positions across Desktop, iPad, Android, and Safari iOS viewports.
